final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing editorial news photo for a Weibo trending-topic banner, intended as a 16:9 wide-format headline cover image.

Style/medium: photorealistic documentary news photography, shot-on-smartphone premium aesthetic, sharp details, high contrast dramatic light
Composition: wide horizontal frame, 16:9, cityscape spanning full width, generous negative space in sky and foreground for text overlay
Subject: urban dusk skyline — pedestrians hurrying past, neon signs beginning to glow, distant skyscrapers reflecting the last sunlight of sunset
Scene/backdrop: city street at golden hour transitioning to dusk, neon lights warming up, high-rise glass facades catching orange-red sunset reflections, real on-scene atmosphere
Lighting/mood: dramatic chiaroscuro — warm amber sunset glow on buildings contrasting with cool emerging neon; strong light-shadow contrast, cinematic tension with documentary authenticity
Color palette: deep amber and burnt orange sunset tones against cool blue-purple dusk sky, punctuated by neon warm whites and reds
Materials/textures: photorealistic street textures — wet pavement reflections, glass curtain-wall reflections, motion blur on pedestrians
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻" (large bold headline, prominent position, heiti or modern sans-serif); "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (subtitle below headline); "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (watermark, bottom-right corner, small)
Constraints: strict 16:9 ratio, all three text elements must appear exactly as specified, headline must be visually dominant, watermark must be legible but unobtrusive
Avoid: studio-lit look, overly saturated HDR tone-mapping, generic stock-photo composition, Western news agency aesthetic, text placement that obscures key scene elements
